definitions.definition: A formal notice is written in a standard and polite tone to inform someone about a particular event, rule, or decision. It is usually written on an official letterhead and signed by the person concerned.

An informal notice is written in a friendly and casual tone to inform someone about a particular event, rule, or decision. It is not usually written on an official letterhead and is often sent via email or text message.
Formal language is used in formal notices and is characterized by the use of complex vocabulary, formal sentence structures, and a polite tone.
definitions.example: The manager's letter to the employee was an example of formal language.

definitions.definition: Informal language is used in informal notices and is characterized by the use of simple vocabulary, casual sentence structures, and a friendly tone.
definitions.example: The text message to the friend was an example of informal language.

definitions.definition: The purpose of a notice is to inform, instruct, or remind someone about a particular event, rule, or decision.
The audience is the person or people who will be reading the notice.
definitions.example: The audience for the notice was the employees of the company.

definitions.definition: Audience analysis is the process of identifying and understanding the needs, preferences, and expectations of the audience.
definitions.example: Before writing the notice, the manager analyzed the audience to determine the best tone and language to use.

definitions.definition: The tone of a notice is the attitude or feeling conveyed to the reader.
definitions.example: The tone of the notice was serious and formal.

definitions.definition: The format of a notice refers to its structure, layout, and organization.
definitions.example: The notice was written in a concise and easy-to-read format.

definitions.definition: Purpose clauses are used to indicate the purpose of a notice.
definitions.example: The purpose of this notice is to inform you of the new policy.

definitions.definition: Notice writing is the process of writing a formal or informal notice to inform, instruct, or remind someone about a particular event, rule, or decision.
Notifiable matters are events, rules, or decisions that must be communicated to someone through a notice.
definitions.example: The company is required to notify its employees of any changes to the company's policies.

definitions.definition: An effective notice is one that clearly and concisely communicates the intended message to the reader.
definitions.example: The notice was effective in communicating the new policy to the employees.

definitions.definition: The language of the notice refers to the tone, vocabulary, and sentence structure used in the notice.
definitions.example: The language of the notice was formal and professional.

definitions.definition: The style of the notice refers to its structure, layout, and organization.
definitions.example: The notice was written in a concise and easy-to-read style.

definitions.definition: Notices of official nature are formal notices issued by government departments, public institutions, and other organizations.
definitions.example: The government issued a notice announcing the new tax policy.

definitions.definition: Notices of private nature are informal notices issued by individuals or private organizations.
definitions.example: The owner of the house issued a notice to the tenant to vacate the premises.
